scripts.test:authority: tsc --target es2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --types node --skipLibCheck --outDir ../../output/partykit-authority ./charades/server.ts ./charades/types.ts && node ./charades/server.authority.check.cjs ../../output/partykit-authority/server.js
scripts.test:authority:codenames: tsc --target es2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --types node --skipLibCheck --outDir ../../output/partykit-codenames ./codenames/server.ts ./codenames/types.ts && node ./codenames/server.authority.check.cjs ../../output/partykit-codenames/server.js
